titles.title: MIdnight in the middle of the Day

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The sun was hot, angry mob Gathered by the greystone building As a man draped in velvet With a curly black beard Stepped out on his balcony

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Nervously washing his hands To rid him of the blood Pilate never wash away His wrinkled brow showed The worry lines, I heard Pilate say:

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: "I find no fault in this man called jesus The healer from the shores of Galilee"

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: "I command you to ask To let him go free Don’t make me take his Blood to the grave with me"

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Nervously washing his hands To rid him of the blood He would never wash away

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: The mob screamed for blood Of this innocent man I heard Pilate pray:

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: And it was midnight In the middle of the day Trembling soldiers fell Before Jesus cross to pray

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: The whole world shook The veil was rent When the sinless christ was slain And it was midnight In the middle of the day

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Thunder rolled across The rumbling mountains Lighting burned like a fire Across the sea

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: But on the holy hill the angels Raised the crimson flag of triumph They shouted death, death, death Good lord, don’t you know The death is swallowed up in victory (in victory)
